prompt: The class fails to serialize because a field is not serializable. What is the bug?
choices: int fields cannot be serialized alongside object fields
Thread does not implement Serializable; serializing Container throws NotSerializableException for the worker field
Container must extend Thread to serialize a Thread field
The serialVersionUID must be set before Thread fields can be serialized
explanation: All non-transient instance fields of a Serializable class must themselves be serializable. Thread is not Serializable. Serializing Container throws NotSerializableException: 'java.lang.Thread'. Fix: declare worker as transient so it is excluded from serialization.
